name: sc-Nanopore 3′ — TSO concatemers (try it)
assay: 10x Chromium Single Cell 3' Gene Expression (Nanopore long-read)
demoBlurb: A pre-loaded, ready-to-run nanopore example: the reads are uploaded and the spec is built — just Confirm to run QC, then split the TSO concatemers in-silico and re-score.
